title: Small-Data Trace Learning for Reusable Debugging Skills
hypothesis: Agents that reflect on their own debugging traces and store verified reusable skills will solve related debugging tasks more accurately than agents without saved skills.

conditions.name: Baseline
conditions.description: Dory solves each test scenario without retrieved skills.

conditions.name: Learning
conditions.description: Dory runs the paired learn scenario, then Nemo proposes a skill and Puffer checks it.

conditions.name: Reuse
conditions.description: Dory solves each paired test scenario with relevant verified skills available for retrieval.

conditions.name: Random Skill Control
conditions.description: Dory solves each test scenario with an unrelated saved skill to control for generic skill prompting.

scenario_pairs.name: Missing Evidence
scenario_pairs.target_skill: Ask for Missing Evidence Before Guessing

metrics_to_collect.name: Accuracy
metrics_to_collect.description: Whether the final answer matched the expected answer for the scenario.

metrics_to_collect.name: Confidence
metrics_to_collect.description: Dory's reported confidence for the final answer.

metrics_to_collect.name: Confidence Delta
metrics_to_collect.description: Change in confidence between baseline and reuse conditions.

metrics_to_collect.name: Evidence Count
metrics_to_collect.description: Number of evidence items cited in the final answer.

metrics_to_collect.name: Skill Retrieval Success
metrics_to_collect.description: Whether a relevant saved skill was retrieved for the paired test scenario.

metrics_to_collect.name: Skill Usage Count
metrics_to_collect.description: How many times saved skills were applied during the run.

metrics_to_collect.name: Puffer Approval Rate
metrics_to_collect.description: Fraction of proposed skills approved or revised into saveable skills.

metrics_to_collect.name: Duplicate Skill Rejections
metrics_to_collect.description: Number of proposed skills rejected because their final three tags matched an existing skill.

metrics_to_collect.name: Overconfident Wrong Answers
metrics_to_collect.description: Wrong answers with confidence at or above the configured overconfidence threshold.

metrics_to_collect.name: Improvement Rate
metrics_to_collect.description: Fraction of paired test scenarios that were incorrect in baseline and correct in reuse.

reproducibility.notes: This configuration is intended for a small curated prototype benchmark and should not be interpreted as statistically generalizable without more scenarios.
